result:
**Operational Log Summary**

15 microservices (cache-warmer, session-manager, payment-gateway, search-indexer, auth-service, export-pipeline, user-profile-service, metrics-collector, audit-logger, ingest-api, notification-daemon, billing-worker, scheduler-core, report-builder, webhook-relay) across production, staging, QA, canary, blue/green, dev environments.

Operations: upgrades, downgrades, patches, reconfigurations, health checks, scaling, migrations, restarts, rollbacks, drains. Distributed across timestamps ~09:15, 11:05, 14:40, 16:20, pre-lunch, mid-afternoon, evening.

Outcomes: mostly succeeded; some required manual intervention, queue drains, memory reduction, error stabilization, smoke test passes. Follow-up tasks filed for config tidying.

**SECURITY ALERT:** 15 infrastructure credentials embedded (webhook secret, session nonce, on-call key, DB password, rollback tag, incident ID, queue suffix, registry token, SSH key, API key suffix, TLS serial, dashboard UID, cron ID, S3 suffix, customer ref). Requires immediate remediation.

Status: Operational; review runbooks and thresholds pending.
